command:
echo '=== N8N API CHECK ==='
# Check n8n API root
curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows?limit=250   -H 'X-N8N-API-KEY: n8n_api_cGsw5UdCHVtqCFSiZBJiN1fhGzVvdwuH09Vkrd3V_lW-YKUGi4C1fv7Bx5OtbAL7GgNEO1YmO' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
raw=sys.stdin.read()
try:
    data=json.loads(raw)
    print('Status: success')
    print('Keys:', list(data.keys()))
    wf=data.get('data',[])
    print(f'Workflow count: {len(wf)}')
    for w in wf[:5]:
        print(f'  [{w["id"]}] {w["name"]} active={w["active"]}')
except:
    print('Raw (first 500):', raw[:500])
"
echo '=== N8N VERSION ==='
curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/version   -H 'X-N8N-API-KEY: n8n_api_cGsw5UdCHVtqCFSiZBJiN1fhGzVvdwuH09Vkrd3V_lW-YKUGi4C1fv7Bx5OtbAL7GgNEO1YmO' 2>&1
echo
echo '=== N8N SETTINGS ==='
# Check if n8n is running as service
systemctl status n8n 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "n8n not a systemd service"
# Check docker
docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i n8n || echo "n8n not in docker"
ps aux 2>/dev/null | grep -i n8n | grep -v grep | head -5
echo 'DONE_1851'
